description_long: This object is a classical monument featuring a white marble statue of a woman with a lamb, set against a backdrop of two ornate columns and a decorative entablature. The statue stands on a rectangular pedestal, and the entire structure is framed by a partial wall with a corniced top. The columns are fluted and topped with Corinthian capitals, adding to the neoclassical aesthetic. At the base, there is a patch of green grass, suggesting an outdoor park or garden setting. The rear of the structure is plain and unadorned, with the main decorative elements concentrated on the front-facing side.
description: A neoclassical marble monument with a female statue and lamb, flanked by ornate columns and set on a pedestal, with grass at the base.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the statue, both columns, and the detailed cornice, with the grass patch visible at the base.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the statue, pedestal, and both columns, with the architectural details most prominent.
description_view_2: Rear-left view showing the plain back of the structure and a partial glimpse of the statue's side.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the unadorned wall and the back of the columns, with minimal decorative detail visible.
attribute_ornamentation: The front features a detailed marble statue of a woman with a lamb, flanked by two fluted columns with Corinthian capitals and a decorative cornice.
attribute_base_design: The base is a rectangular marble pedestal supporting the statue, set on a flat platform with a small patch of grass in front. The pedestal is plain with minimal decorative molding.
attribute_tip_design: The top is a flat entablature with classical cornice detailing, lacking a pointed or pyramidal tip typical of traditional obelisks.
attribute_surrounding_features: A patch of green grass is present at the base, and the structure is bordered by two columns and a partial wall.
